entries.title: Barry Diller trusts Sam Altman. But ‘trust is irrelevant’ as AGI nears, he says.
entries.description: Barry Diller defended OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while warning that AGI remains an unpredictable force needing guardrails.

entries.title: Snap says its $400M deal with Perplexity ‘amicably ended’
entries.description: The deal, announced last November, would have seen Perplexity's AI search engine integrated directly into Snapchat.

entries.title: Is xAI a neocloud now?
entries.description: xAI's real business may be more about building data centers than training AI models.

entries.title: How Elon Musk left OpenAI, according to Greg Brockman
entries.description: Cutthroat negotiations between startup founders are rarely shared so publicly, especially when a company becomes as world-changing as OpenAI.

entries.title: SpaceX may spend up to $119B on ‘Terafab’ chip factory in Texas
entries.description: The project would be a "multi-phase, next-generation, vertically integrated semiconductor manufacturing and advanced computing fabrication facility," according to the proposal.

entries.title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
entries.description: The Chinese AI lab came to prominence in early 2025 after launching a large language model that trained on a fraction of the compute power and at a fraction of the cost of the big U.S. models like tho

entries.title: Google updates AI search to include quotes from Reddit and other sources
entries.description: While citing web forums and discussion boards can help users find answers to more niche queries, this design choice could also prove chaotic.

entries.title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full stack, demo shows
entries.description: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing

entries.title: Tinder owner Match Group is slowing hiring to pay for its increased use of AI tools
entries.description: Match Group said that it's slowing its hiring plans for the rest of the year because AI tools "cost a lot of money."

entries.title: Apple to pay $250M to settle lawsuit over Siri’s delayed AI features
entries.description: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit for overpromising the arrival of Siri's AI features.

entries.title: Ethos raises $22.75M from a16z for its expert network with voice onboarding
entries.description: Ethos says it is onboarding 35,000 experts per week.

entries.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, all your M&A questions will be answered
entries.description: Leaders from Coinbase, M13, and Mignano Law Group talk about how M&A is an early-stage strategy at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Register to hear this live.

entries.title: 3 days left to lock in 50% off a second ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026

entries.title: AI boom pushes Samsung to $1T
entries.description: Samsung crossed the $1 trillion valuation mark after shares surged on AI-driven chip demand, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the milestone.

entries.title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
entries.description: Enterprise AI will be QuTwo’s bread and butter. “AI is the north star that we will continue to aim for. Quantum is just a new type of compute,” said Sarlin, who is adamant that QuTwo is an AI company.

entries.title: Marc Lore says that AI will soon enable anyone to open a restaurant
entries.description: Wonder wants to turn its robotic kitchens into AI-powered “restaurant factories,” letting anyone spin up a virtual food brand with a prompt.

entries.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
entries.description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

entries.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
entries.description: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying  data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

entries.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
entries.description: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.
